name: Culture Wars Pack Black Cards List
blackCards: If the RADICAL LEFT gets their way, they’ll cancel _______!
Stop trying to blame this on guns. Mass shootings are really caused by _______!
whiteCards: Arguing about whether gay cops get to march in Pride.
Expressing offensive views behind closed doors with longtime friends.
Getting mad at someone for not getting mad enough about what I’m mad about.
Googling “how to do an at-home abortion.”
My constitutional right to carry a concealed submachine gun into Chipotle.
Scanning a QR code to learn more about how Home Depot is celebrating LGBTQ voices.
Stuffing Tucker Carlson in the microwave and pressing “potato.”
Tattooing my balls blue and yellow in solidarity with Ukraine.
